{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 80, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Utility color codes are misapplied/misread: red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm is incorrect per 811/CGA best practices.", "Incorrect color marking creates excavation safety hazards and risk of utility strike."], "actions": ["Remove or cover incorrect utility locate marks and re-mark using correct 811/CGA color codes: red=electric, yellow=gas/oil/steam, orange=telecom, blue=potable water, green=sewer/drainage.", "Re-train personnel on 811/CGA color code standards and verify with competent person before proceeding."], "rationale": "811/CGA best practices specify standardized utility color codes; the observed color assignments are wrong for multiple utilities, which is a non-compliant and hazardous condition during rough-complete sitework.", "references": ["811/CGA best practices for utility locate color codes"]}
